hops.context: Mode-3 is an optimized derivative of Mode-2

question: In the context of the configurable mixed precision architecture based on the Ibex core, how does nn/mac/2b as Mode-3 relate to Mode-2?

options.A: Mode-3, represented by nn/mac/2b, is an optimized derivative of Mode-2, which operates at medium speed.
options.B: nn/mac/2b as Mode-3 is a direct, high-speed enhancement of Mode-2, aimed at improving computational power.
options.C: Mode-3, indicated by nn/mac/2b, functions independently of Mode-2 and is focused on data storage enhancements.
options.D: Mode-3, denoted by nn/mac/2b, is a slower, more energy-efficient version of the high-speed Mode-2.

explanation: According to the paper, nn/mac/2b corresponds to Mode-3, which is specifically described as an optimized derivative of Mode-2, operating at medium speed. This indicates that while Mode-3 derives from Mode-2, it carries optimizations that distinguish it from the latter. Options B, C, and D are incorrect as they inaccurately describe the speed, function, and relationship between Mode-3 and Mode-2.
context: nn/mac/2b corresponds to Mode-3 | Mode-3 is an optimized derivative of Mode-2 | Mode-2 (medium-speed)

hops.context: if 2-bit precision is used for weights, our third INT2 optimization technique is also applied
we apply a soft SIMD technique

question: In the configurable mixed precision architecture based on the Ibex core, what technique is applied to Mode-3 when using 2-bit precision for weights?

options.A: A soft SIMD technique is applied, enhancing computational efficiency and precision.
options.B: A hardware-accelerated vector processing technique is implemented to increase speed.
options.C: An INT8 optimization technique is utilized, focusing on maximizing data throughput.
options.D: A binary precision optimization is used to reduce computational complexity.

explanation: The paper mentions that in Mode-3, when 2-bit precision is used for weights, a third INT2 optimization technique, specifically a soft SIMD technique, is applied. This technique is part of the soft SIMD category, which typically aims to enhance computational efficiency and precision in such configurations.
context: nn/mac/2b corresponds to Mode-3 | if 2-bit precision is used for weights, our third INT2 optimization technique is also applied | we apply a soft SIMD technique
